findings.title: Duplicate supplier invoices — same supplier, document reference and amount
findings.recommendedFix: Recover confirmed duplicate payments; enable the X3 duplicate-invoice control to block same supplier+reference+amount at entry.

findings.title: Active super-user accounts holding unrestricted all-function access
findings.recommendedFix: Remove the all-access function profile from operational users; restrict super-user to a break-glass account with logging.

findings.title: Same user created the source voucher and its payment (SoD breach)
findings.recommendedFix: Split voucher creation from payment authorisation; enforce a maker-checker workflow lock on the payment run.

findings.title: Suspense / clearing accounts carrying aged (>30 day) unreconciled balances
findings.recommendedFix: Age and clear suspense balances; enforce a month-end zero-balance control with escalation past 30 days.

findings.title: Overpayments — paid amount exceeds the invoiced amount
findings.recommendedFix: Recover supplier overpayments; block payment lines that exceed the matched invoice value.

findings.title: Back-dated entries — validation date precedes the accounting date
findings.recommendedFix: Restrict back-dating to a bounded window behind secondary approval; audit the 40 violating rows.

findings.title: Sensitive security / configuration tables without change auditing enabled
findings.recommendedFix: Turn on field-level audit tracking for AUTILIS, ASYSACCES and bank/VAT config tables.

findings.title: Duplicate suppliers by normalised name (e.g. APPLE ×2, UNITED PARCEL SERVICE ×2)
findings.recommendedFix: Run a merge review on the 6 name collisions; add a normalised-name uniqueness check at vendor creation.

findings.title: Vendor master records missing bank details and pay-to partner codes
findings.recommendedFix: Back-fill and validate vendor bank details; block payment runs on incomplete records.

findings.title: Negative stock at site level and expired lots beyond NRV
findings.recommendedFix: Investigate negative on-hand; implement weekly ABC cycle counting with variance and quarterly NRV review.

findings.title: Customer open balances exceeding authorised credit limits
findings.recommendedFix: Enforce the credit-limit block on order release; review the over-limit accounts.

uploads.fileTypeDescription: GACCENTRY / GACCENTRYD legal & IFRS ledger journal lines (RPS01)
PINVOICE supplier invoices + BPSUPPLIER vendor master & open items
PORDER / PORDERQ commitment lines for three-way match
AUTILIS users × ASYSACCES function profiles & all-access flags

findings.title: Residual duplicate-invoice exceptions on amended documents
findings.recommendedFix: Extend the duplicate-invoice control to credited and amended invoices; recover the residual overpayments.

findings.title: Back-dated GL entries (REGRESSION from 2024)
findings.recommendedFix: Re-apply and harden the back-dating lock; the prior control was relaxed during year-end close.

findings.title: Suspense balances re-accumulating after month 6
findings.recommendedFix: Tighten the zero-balance control to weekly; assign a named owner per suspense account.

findings.title: A small number of operational users retain supervisor flags
findings.recommendedFix: Separate supervisor and end-user role flags; recertify the affected accounts.

findings.title: Voucher=payment SoD overlap on two treasury accounts
findings.recommendedFix: Close the remaining dual-role grants on the treasury payment workflow.

findings.title: Vendor master still missing bank details on new records
findings.recommendedFix: Enforce mandatory bank-detail capture at vendor creation.

findings.title: Duplicate partner by EU VAT registration number
findings.recommendedFix: Merge or document the duplicate VAT registrations.

findings.title: Inventory valuation gap on expired lots not fully provided
findings.recommendedFix: Apply the NRV write-down matrix automatically at period close.

uploads.fileTypeDescription: GACCENTRY / GACCENTRYD legal & IFRS ledger journal lines (RPS01)
PINVOICE supplier invoices + BPSUPPLIER vendor master & open items
PORDER / PORDERQ commitment lines for three-way match
AUTILIS users × ASYSACCES function profiles & all-access flags

findings.title: Duplicate supplier invoices — same supplier, document reference and amount
findings.recommendedFix: Recover the confirmed duplicate payments and block same supplier+reference+amount at entry (F-P2P-001).

findings.title: Suspense / clearing accounts with aged (>30 day) unreconciled balances
findings.recommendedFix: Clear and reconcile the aged residuals; enforce a month-end zero-balance control with >30-day escalation.

findings.title: Overpayments — paid amount exceeds the invoiced amount
findings.recommendedFix: Recover the supplier overpayments; block payment lines exceeding the matched invoice value.

findings.title: Back-dated entries — validation date precedes accounting date (40 rows)
findings.recommendedFix: Make the back-dating lock permanent behind secondary approval; clear the 40 violating rows (F-R2R).

findings.title: Same user created the source voucher and its payment (SoD breach)
findings.recommendedFix: Enforce maker-checker on the payment run; remove the dual-role grant that allows self-payment.

findings.title: Active super-user accounts holding unrestricted all-function access
findings.recommendedFix: Strip the all-access function profile from operational users; restrict super-user to a logged break-glass account (F-ITGC).

findings.title: Sensitive security / configuration tables without change auditing enabled
findings.recommendedFix: Enable field-level audit tracking on access, bank and VAT configuration tables.

findings.title: Duplicate suppliers by normalised name (6 collisions, e.g. APPLE ×2, UPS ×2)
findings.recommendedFix: Run a merge review on the collisions; add a normalised-name uniqueness check at vendor creation (F-P2P-012).

findings.title: Vendor master gaps — missing bank details / pay-to partner codes
findings.recommendedFix: Back-fill and validate vendor bank details; block payment runs on incomplete records.

findings.title: Negative stock at site level and expired lots beyond NRV
findings.recommendedFix: Investigate negative on-hand; weekly ABC cycle counting with variance and quarterly NRV review (F-INVEN-001).

findings.title: Customer open balances exceeding authorised credit limits
findings.recommendedFix: Enforce the credit-limit block on order release; review the over-limit accounts (F-R2R-012 area).

findings.title: VAT / currency configuration gaps — rates missing or not effective
findings.recommendedFix: Add effective rate rows for the affected VAT codes and currencies; remove orphan rate references.

uploads.fileTypeDescription: GACCENTRY / GACCENTRYD legal & IFRS ledger journal lines (RPS01)
PINVOICE supplier invoices + BPSUPPLIER vendor master & open items
PORDER / PORDERQ commitment lines for three-way match
AUTILIS users × ASYSACCES function profiles & all-access flags

findings.title: Intercompany leakage — same vendor paid by multiple legal entities
findings.recommendedFix: Reconcile the duplicated vendor payments across FR/NA/DE entities; net intercompany positions and lock cross-entity vendor creation behind a single master.

findings.title: Suspense / clearing accounts carrying material non-zero balances
findings.recommendedFix: Age and clear suspense balances; enforce a month-end zero-balance control with sign-off on any residual.

findings.title: No segregation of duties across the AP module
findings.recommendedFix: Split invoice creation from approval; enforce a role-based workflow lock.

findings.title: Large AR (management-fee) invoices where creator equals approver
findings.recommendedFix: Add a maker-checker on all fee invoices over R100K; route to an independent reviewer.

findings.title: Dormant accounts retaining high-privilege function profiles
findings.recommendedFix: Deactivate accounts idle 90+ days; quarterly privilege recertification.

findings.title: Trial-balance imbalance by company × period (consolidation integrity)
findings.recommendedFix: Trace the company/period imbalances; correct mispostings before close and gate consolidation on a balanced TB.

findings.title: Back-dated entries (accounting date earlier than creation date)
findings.recommendedFix: Restrict back-dating to a bounded window behind secondary approval; audit historic back-dated GL.

findings.title: AR open items > 1 year old (potential write-off / overstated assets)
findings.recommendedFix: Review and provide/write off aged debtors; introduce a 12-month ageing trigger.

findings.title: Benford's-Law deviation on GL line amounts (manual-entry clustering)
findings.recommendedFix: Investigate the leading-digit clusters; focus review on manual journals around thresholds.

findings.title: Accounting periods still open in prior fiscal years
findings.recommendedFix: Close prior-year periods; enforce a hard close calendar.

findings.title: Residual intercompany imbalances on netting accounts
findings.recommendedFix: Automate the intercompany netting reconciliation; alert on any non-netting balance over R25K.

findings.title: Suspense balances re-accumulating after month 6
findings.recommendedFix: Tighten the zero-balance control to weekly; assign a named owner per suspense account.

findings.title: Back-dated GL entries (REGRESSION from 2024)
findings.recommendedFix: Re-apply and harden the back-dating lock; the prior control was relaxed during year-end.

findings.title: Management-fee invoices missing independent approval on edge cases
findings.recommendedFix: Close the workflow gap for amended/credited fee invoices.

findings.title: Vendor master records missing bank-account details
findings.recommendedFix: Back-fill and validate vendor bank details; block payment runs on incomplete records.

findings.title: Aged AR not provided per policy
findings.recommendedFix: Apply the ageing-provision matrix automatically at close.

findings.title: Customisation manifest drift (non-vanilla objects undocumented)
findings.recommendedFix: Document and review specifics; flag undocumented customisations before upgrade.

findings.title: Period-end posting spike (last-week effect)
findings.recommendedFix: Smooth the close calendar; pre-post recurring journals.

findings.title: Back-dated GL entries still possible at year-end (carried gap)
findings.recommendedFix: Make the year-end back-dating lock permanent; remove the manual override.

findings.title: Intercompany netting exceptions on two dormant entities
findings.recommendedFix: Resolve the residual positions on the dormant entities and close them in X3.

findings.title: Users with both supervisor and end-user role flags (privilege concentration)
findings.recommendedFix: Separate supervisor and operational roles; recertify the affected users.

findings.title: Suspense account 18900 not fully cleared at H1
findings.recommendedFix: Clear and reclassify the residual; add it to the weekly zero-balance check.

findings.title: Aged AR write-off candidates above provision
findings.recommendedFix: Write off the irrecoverable balances; tighten the credit-control follow-up.

findings.title: Two vendors registered under the same VAT-ID
findings.recommendedFix: Merge or document the duplicate registrations.

findings.title: GL postings outside business hours (00:00–06:00)
findings.recommendedFix: Review the out-of-hours batch; confirm it is scheduled, not manual.

findings.title: Goods receipts > 90 days without a matching AP invoice (accrual exposure)
findings.recommendedFix: Reconcile GRNI; chase or reverse stale receipts and book the true accrual. Add a 60-day GRNI ageing alert.

findings.title: Duplicate vendor invoice numbers (potential duplicate payment)
findings.recommendedFix: Recover the duplicate payments; enforce a unique (vendor, invoice-no) constraint and a pre-payment duplicate check.

findings.title: Three-way match failures (PO / Goods-Receipt / Invoice mismatch)
findings.recommendedFix: Enforce tolerance-based three-way match before payment; block off-match invoices.

findings.title: POs clustered just below the standard approval threshold
findings.recommendedFix: Investigate threshold-splitting; add cumulative-spend approval logic per vendor/period.

findings.title: Weekend GL postings on store cash accounts (out-of-hours fraud indicator)
findings.recommendedFix: Review weekend cash postings per store; require maker-checker on cash journals.

findings.title: Items with negative or zero cost price (CPRAMT_0)
findings.recommendedFix: Correct the zero/negative standard costs; gate item activation on a valid cost.

findings.title: Stock items with no movement in > 365 days (slow / obsolete)
findings.recommendedFix: Write down obsolete stock; introduce a slow-mover review at each store.

findings.title: Vendor master records missing bank-account details
findings.recommendedFix: Back-fill and validate vendor bank details; block payment on incomplete records.

findings.title: Royalty / marketing-levy accruals understated vs sales
findings.recommendedFix: Reconcile levy accruals to franchised sales; automate the monthly accrual.

findings.title: Large transactions with zero VAT despite a configured VAT account
findings.recommendedFix: Review zero-VAT high-value lines; correct tax determination.

findings.title: Residual GRNI ageing on three high-volume stores
findings.recommendedFix: Extend the GRNI alert to store level; assign clearing ownership per store manager.

findings.title: Duplicate-payment control not covering credit notes
findings.recommendedFix: Extend the duplicate check to credits and re-issued invoices.

findings.title: Weekend cash postings (REGRESSION from 2024)
findings.recommendedFix: Re-apply the maker-checker; the weekend lock was disabled during a POS rollout.

findings.title: Three-way-match tolerance set too wide on packaging vendors
findings.recommendedFix: Tighten tolerance bands; review packaging spend variances.

findings.title: Obsolete-stock provision not applied at all sites
findings.recommendedFix: Apply the slow-mover write-down policy group-wide.

findings.title: Vendors paid by multiple store entities (intercompany leakage)
findings.recommendedFix: Consolidate shared vendors; net intercompany store balances.

findings.title: Period-end posting spike at month close
findings.recommendedFix: Pre-post recurring journals; smooth the close.

findings.title: Store-manager accounts with stale passwords (>180 days)
findings.recommendedFix: Enforce rotation; expire stale credentials.

findings.title: Weekend cash postings still un-gated on two regions
findings.recommendedFix: Roll the maker-checker to the remaining regions; remove the POS-rollout exemption.

findings.title: GRNI > 90 days creeping back on new-store openings
findings.recommendedFix: Add GRNI clearing to the new-store go-live checklist.

findings.title: Duplicate vendor records sharing identical bank account
findings.recommendedFix: Merge duplicates keyed on bank account; add a uniqueness constraint.

findings.title: POs to vendors flagged one-time / non-trading
findings.recommendedFix: Block POs to one-time vendors without a buyer override and reason.

findings.title: Obsolete stock above provision at four sites
findings.recommendedFix: Write down and tighten ordering at the affected sites.

findings.title: Active customers (corporate accounts) with no credit limit
findings.recommendedFix: Set credit limits on corporate/event accounts.

findings.title: Large payments to vendors created in the last 90 days (fast-money check)
findings.recommendedFix: Hold first large payment to new vendors for verification.
